title: Password Security Policy
content: All production passwords must be at least 14 characters, rotated every 90 days, and never shared in plaintext over chat or email.

title: Incident Response Process
content: Security incidents must be acknowledged in 15 minutes, triaged in one hour, and escalated to the on-call incident commander.

title: Data Retention Standard
content: Customer support logs are retained for 180 days. Financial audit records are retained for 7 years under compliance policy.

title: Model Deployment Guardrails
content: Every AI release requires unit tests, model evaluation above threshold, AI security tests, and manual production approval.
